title: Biblia Koshodou no Jiken Techou
titleNative: ビブリア古書堂の事件手帖
synonyms: The Case Files of Biblia Bookstore
synopsis: Biblia Koshodou no Jiken Techou is a mystery series where Shinokawa Shioriko, a young owner of a bookstore in Kamakura, unravel mysteries of ancient books that are taken there. The story begins with a young man named Daisuke, who grew up practically without reading books due to a "phobia," brings the complete (and autographed) works of Natsume Soseki, Japanese writer of the Meiji era, inherited from his grandmother in the mysterious bookstore. Will the shy and introvert Shioriko solve the mystery of the books?

title: Himekishi-sama no Himo
synonyms: The Kept Man of the Princess Knight
synopsis: Matthew is just another parasite in the chaotic dungeon city of Gray Neighbor. People say he's a lazy weakling who gambles and drinks away all the money he gets from his keeper, princess knight Arwin. But the truth is, no one in this town knows what he's really like—a ruthless protector who works in the shadows and will do whatever it takes for the sake of his mistress. (Source: Yen Press)

title: Hanaori-san Still Wants to Fight in the Next Life
titleRomaji: Hanaori-san wa Tensei Shite mo Kenka ga Shitai
titleEnglish: Hanaori-san Still Wants to Fight in the Next Life
titleNative: 花織さんは転生しても喧嘩がしたい
synonyms: Hanaori-san Wants to Have A Fight Even If She Reincarnates
synopsis: Ryuusei Narukami spends his days cooped up in his room playing video games, but hides a secret past as an evil dark lord from a fantasy world reincarnated into our world. He has a fateful encounter with the belligerent Hanaori Meteor, the hero from Ryuusei's world who defeated him, now reincarnated as a high school girl. (Source: Anime News Network, edited)

title: Oni no Hanayome
synopsis: A Japanese-style ayakashi Cinderella story! "You're the bride I've been searching for all this time." The ayakashi and humans coexist in harmony. The ayakashi, having superior abilities and beautiful appearances, sometimes find their partner among human women, making them their "bride". The bride, in exchange for bringing prosperity, receives absolute love from the ayakashi. Yuzu is constantly compared to her sister, a bride of a demon fox, and is resented by her family every day. One day, when Yuzu just couldn't take things anymore, a man appears before her on a bridge. This man is the most beautiful man Yuzu has ever seen... and he's calling her his wife?! "Just be quiet and let me hold you." The most powerful, "cold-hearted" ayakashi is pouring his heart out for Yuzu?! (Source: MangaPlaza)

title: Shiotaiou no Satou-san ga Ore ni dake Amai
titleRomaji: Shiotaiou no Satou-san ga Ore ni dake Amai
titleNative: 塩対応の佐藤さんが俺にだけ甘い
synonyms: The Cold Sato-san is Only Sweet to Me
synopsis: Sato-san is the unattainable flower of the class. She is always cold and curt with classmates, but only I know she's actually very cute when she smiles, even if she's not much of a photographer. Oshio-kun is friendly and lively, but only I know he works at his family's cafe after school. He does a great job with the cafe's SNS account, and his mischievous smile makes my heart skip a beat! Innocent and sweet, but sometimes frustrating, this is a 120%-pure fluffy story about two people falling in love for the first time.

title: Qing Jiao Wo Gui Chai Da Ren
titleRomaji: Qing Jiao Wo Gui Chai Da Ren
synopsis: A perpetual night of catastrophe, terror descends, and strange phenomena abound! A young man, Wang Ye, is inexplicably chosen by the "Mysterious Post Office" to serve as a "ghost messenger," awakening his special powers and repeatedly embroiling himself in dangerous and paranormal phenomena. Witness how Wang Ye pushes the envelope, dispelling the mysteries and igniting the flames of humanity's survival amidst the terrifying darkness. (Source: Tencent, translated)

title: Mujikaku Seijo wa Kyou mo Muishiki ni Chikara wo Tare Nagasu
titleRomaji: Mujikaku Seijo wa Kyou mo Muishiki ni Chikara wo Tare Nagasu
titleNative: 無自覚聖女は今日も無意識に力を垂れ流す
synonyms: The Oblivious Saint Can't Contain Her Power Glossary
synopsis: Lady Carolina, the overlooked daughter of a powerful duke, has always believed herself to be the black sheep amid her illustrious kin. Her father is the distinguished prime minister; her elder sister, a prodigious mage destined to become their nation’s next Saint. In comparison, Carolina resigns herself to a quiet existence in their shadows until a sudden and unexpected royal decree alters her destiny, thrusting her into a political marriage with the formidable “Bloodthirsty Prince” of the neighboring Empire of Malcosias. Determined to prove her worth, Carolina takes a bold step into a world fraught with both political and mortal peril. As royal obligations intertwine with hints of true love and the stirrings of her own latent power, Carolina moves ever closer to understanding what it truly means to be exceptional. (Source: J-Novel Club)

title: Reiwa no Dara-san
synopsis: Clouds blacken the sky and sheets of rain turn the mountain forest into a treacherous maze... A landslide crushes a razor wire fence, and buries a "NO TRESPASSING" sign... Two young siblings wander into a dark world where they do not belong, and a long, horrid shadow rears up to meet them- Anyway, so that's how we met Dara-san! She might look kinda scary, but just wait until you get to know her! "Look, I'm a god of misfortune, okay!? Aren't you kids gonna freak out about my grotesque visage!?" (Source: Yen Press)

synopsis: Tenka Momose, a high school freshman that can sing and dance... she's pretty and smart to boot! She's good at everything but love. One day she meets Erian Satou, and was pulled in by her passionate dedication to becoming an idol. This is the story about two young girls chasing after their K-Pop idol dream!! (Source: Comikey)

title: Itou Junji: Crimson
synopsis: Crimson refers to the color crimson or bright red, and the concept of this volume is "monsters." This is a collection of horror stories that carefully selects masterpieces filled with unique madness, allowing you to immerse yourself in the eerie, bizarre, and yet original world of Junji Ito. (Source: Official Website, translated)

title: Hina
synopsis: Hina is Beautiful is a "highly entertaining action drama" film directed by Kenji Iwaisawa. Taking place in Izu, Japan, where the local men are fighting over a woman called Hina. What is it exactly that makes Hina mislead men? As the men try to confess their true feelings for Hina, strong, muscly men also get involved and the sound of the festival drum signals the start of a confrontation. (Source: Variety, edited)

tags.name: Rotoscoping

title: Majo to Youhei
synopsis: Nothing in this world is more dangerous than a witch. The epitome of fear and terror, they can summon floods on a whim, conjure balls of fire out of the air, or even destroy entire countries overnight. Incur their wrath, and no one is safe. At least, that’s what everyone thinks, and it’s the very reason they all want Siasha dead. After yet another violent battle for her life, she teams up with Zig, a mercenary, and they depart for unknown lands to find somewhere she can live in peace. But is the pair any match for the lost magic and vicious monstrosities that lie ahead? (Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

titleNative: 「きみを愛する気はない」と言った次期公爵様がなぜか溺愛してきます
synonyms: The Duke’s Son Claims He Won’t Love Me Yet Showers Me with Adoration
synopsis: Elsa, the daughter of a fallen aristocrat, receives news. It was a marriage proposal from Julius, a very elite nobleman. Elsa is wondering," Why would such a distinguished man marry me"? But after the wedding, Julius, who had been kind and gentle up to that point, changed completely! In a cold voice, he tells her," I have no intention of loving you". (Source: MangaPlaza)

title: Doumo, Suki na Hito ni Horegusuri wo Irai Sareta Majo desu.
titleRomaji: Doumo, Suki na Hito ni Horegusuri wo Irai Sareta Majo desu.
titleNative: どうも、好きな人に惚れ薬を依頼された魔女です。
synonyms: Hi, I'm a Witch, and My Crush Wants Me to Make a Love Potion
I'm a witch who's crush requested a love potion
synopsis: “Make me a love potion.” And with that single sentence, the Good Witch of the Lake’s secret crush on the dashing Sir Harij ends in heartbreak. Still, when he promises to help her gather the ingredients, Rose is thrilled at the chance to gaze upon a man she’d normally never get to interact with. She learns to brace her pounding heart for their usual stilted conversations…but what is she to do when he inexplicably shows up at her doorstep with bread and a jar of apple butter? (Source: Yen Press)
